steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to identify the title of Singer's first published short story. Any correct answer must state the title itself.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Acclaimed writer Isaac Bashevis Singer's first published work of fiction was a short story.: describes Singer as an acclaimed writer and notes his first published work was a short story, but never names 'Gimpel the Fool' — the title is absent. ✗
  • Choice B — Isaac Bashevis Singer's first published short story was called "Gimpel the Fool.": names the title directly and connects it to Singer's first published short story — accomplishes the goal. ✓
  • Choice C — In 1953, a short story by Isaac Bashevis Singer appeared in The Partisan Review.: provides the year (1953) and venue (The Partisan Review) where the story appeared, but omits the title itself. ✗
  • Choice D — Isaac Bashevis Singer's first published work of fiction appeared in 1953.: gives the publication year (1953) but does not name the story. ✗
That is the correct answer.
